_doc: Backend operations exposed for the diversity atlas. Single operation today: `import_slot` wraps GET /api/diversity/{slot} (atlas-core/server/diversity_endpoint.py — JSON-shim for the 5 diversity slots loaded by shared/data_loader.js). The `staging_diversity_slot` layer in layers.registry.json resolves through this operation; the parallel `import_slot` action in actions.registry.json captures it via POST /api/actions. Server compute beyond this (per-sample thetaStat from SAFs, ngsRelate kinship rebuild, multi-scale θπ aggregation) lands when the LANTA jobs ship — see actions.registry.json for the planned action runners and _handoff_docs/MISSING_DATA.md for the substrate gaps.

query_params.slot: string — one of: embedded_tables | texture_metrics | functional_burden | roh_gene_overlap | divergence_network

import_slot._doc: Returns the raw JSON bytes of one of the 5 diversity slot files. The shim falls back to a 404 when the slot file isn't present (the four non-bulk slots are optional today — see _handoff_docs/DATA_PROVENANCE.md §2.4). Round-1: shared/data_loader.js calls these endpoints directly (preferred path) and falls back to static fetches of data/<slot>.json. The action-pipeline path POST /api/actions {type:import_slot, target:{slot}} captures the same bytes into a staging_diversity_slot_v0 layer envelope for provenance / audit.
